questions.question: Describe the truth table for a 4-bit binary adder. How do the inputs and outputs relate to each other? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the input and output variables, and explain the carrying mechanism.

questions.question: Write the VHDL code for a 3-bit binary adder. Use the 'process' statement and 'or' operator to implement the full adder. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Make sure to include the initial values for the inputs and the carry-out variable.

questions.question: Analyze the HDL model of a 4-bit binary adder to determine the number of logic gates required. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the combinational logic blocks and count the number of AND, OR, and NOT gates.
